name: EGU Training Schools
notes: Core geoscience training source.
notes_zh: 核心地球科学培训资源。

name: IAHS
notes: International Association of Hydrological Sciences. Cloudflare blocks datacenter IPs; the Monday/Wednesday/Friday source scan runs from a residential connection, where it loads fine.
notes_zh: 国际水文科学协会。Cloudflare 会屏蔽数据中心 IP；每周一、周三和周五的来源扫描通过住宅网络连接运行，因此可以正常加载。

name: IAH
notes: International Association of Hydrogeologists.
notes_zh: 国际水文地质学家协会。

name: CUAHSI
notes: Hydrology workshops and training. The workshops page is a single-page app that loads its list only after interaction, so scripted requests see no content. Check it directly.
notes_zh: 水文学研讨会与培训。研讨会页面为单页应用，需交互后才加载列表，因此脚本请求无法获取内容。请直接查看。

name: NASA ARSET
notes: NASA Applied Remote Sensing Training. Unreachable from the GitHub runner but loads from a residential connection; most ARSET trainings are online so expect mostly near-matches.
notes_zh: NASA应用遥感培训。从GitHub运行器无法访问，但从住宅连接可加载；大多数ARSET培训为在线形式，因此预计主要为近似匹配。

name: DAAD Short Courses
notes: Funding source; opportunity pages may be linked elsewhere.
notes_zh: 资金来源；机会页面可能在其他地方链接。

name: ELLIS
notes: AI and scientific ML events. The site is a single-page app whose detail pages are empty shells, but its server-rendered listing carries each event's dates and location inline, so it is parsed by a dedicated listing collector (see src/research_school_radar/api_sources.py).
notes_zh: AI与科学机器学习活动。该网站为单页应用，详情页为空壳，但服务端渲染的列表内嵌了每个活动的日期和地点，因此由专用列表收集器解析（见 src/research_school_radar/api_sources.py）。

name: IHE Delft
notes: Premier water education source. The listing is client-side rendered (empty HTML), so it is collected directly from its public JSON API instead (see src/research_school_radar/api_sources.py), which gives exact dates, deadline, and fee.
notes_zh: 顶级水资源教育平台。该列表为客户端渲染（HTML为空），因此直接从其公共JSON API获取（见src/research_school_radar/api_sources.py），包含确切日期、截止日期和费用。

name: IIASA
notes: Strong-relevance research institute, but the site sits behind Cloudflare bot management (a "Just a moment" challenge) that returns 403 to scripted requests and blocks even a real headless browser. Left disabled rather than circumvented; check it directly.
notes_zh: 高度相关的研究机构，但网站使用Cloudflare机器人管理（“请稍候”验证），脚本请求返回403，甚至真实无头浏览器也被拦截。未绕过而保持禁用；请直接查看。

name: GFZ Potsdam
notes: Strong geoscience relevance.
notes_zh: 与地球科学高度相关。

name: UKCEH
notes: UK environmental science training listing. Previous /training redirected to a 403 page.
notes_zh: 英国环境科学培训列表。之前的/training页面重定向到403页面。

name: ICIMOD
notes: Strong regional water and climate relevance. SERVIR subdomain is skipped because local TLS certificate validation fails.
notes_zh: 与区域水和气候高度相关。因本地TLS证书验证失败，跳过SERVIR子域。

name: Asian Institute of Technology
notes: Regional university source.
notes_zh: 区域大学来源。

name: ECMWF Training
notes: European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts training catalogue. Many courses are online; in-person ones surface as candidates.
notes_zh: 欧洲中期天气预报中心培训目录。许多课程为在线形式；线下课程作为候选出现。

name: ESA EO4Society Training
notes: European Space Agency Earth observation training and education.
notes_zh: 欧洲空间局地球观测培训与教育。

name: NCAR ASP Colloquia
notes: NCAR Advanced Study Program summer colloquia, usually funded for early-career researchers.
notes_zh: NCAR高级研究项目暑期研讨会，通常资助早期职业研究人员。

name: PIK Potsdam Events
notes: Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research events.
notes_zh: 波茨坦气候影响研究所活动。

name: HIDA Events
notes: Helmholtz Information and Data Science Academy events, including schools for environmental data science.
notes_zh: 亥姆霍兹信息与数据科学学院活动，包括环境数据科学学校。

name: MLSS Index
notes: Canonical index of Machine Learning Summer Schools worldwide.
notes_zh: 全球机器学习暑期学校的权威索引。

name: EEML
notes: Eastern European Machine Learning Summer School.
notes_zh: 东欧机器学习暑期学校。

name: Mediterranean ML Summer School
notes: M2L summer school on machine learning.
notes_zh: M2L机器学习暑期学校。

name: Nordic ProbAI
notes: Nordic Probabilistic AI School.
notes_zh: 北欧概率人工智能学校。

name: Gaussian Process Summer School
notes: Sheffield Gaussian Process Summer School, relevant to uncertainty quantification.
notes_zh: 谢菲尔德高斯过程暑期学校，与不确定性量化相关。

name: Deep Learning Indaba
notes: Pan-African deep learning summer school with travel support.
notes_zh: 泛非深度学习暑期学校，提供差旅支持。

name: IWA
notes: International Water Association events and conferences.
notes_zh: 国际水协会（IWA）的活动与会议。

name: IAHR
notes: International Association for Hydro-Environment Engineering and Research.
notes_zh: 国际水利与环境工程学会（IAHR）

name: SIWI
notes: Stockholm International Water Institute events.
notes_zh: 斯德哥尔摩国际水研究所活动。

name: GEWEX
notes: Global Energy and Water Exchanges programme of the World Climate Research Programme.
notes_zh: 世界气候研究计划的全球能源与水交换计划。

name: AMS Meetings
notes: American Meteorological Society meetings and short courses.
notes_zh: 美国气象学会会议与短期课程。

name: WCRP
notes: World Climate Research Programme. The /events path 404s; the homepage links current activities.
notes_zh: 世界气候研究计划。路径/events返回404；主页链接了当前活动。

name: WMO ETRP
notes: World Meteorological Organization Education and Training Programme.
notes_zh: 世界气象组织教育与培训计划。

name: GFDL Events
notes: NOAA Geophysical Fluid Dynamics Laboratory events.
notes_zh: NOAA地球物理流体动力学实验室活动。

name: Urbino Summer School
notes: Urbino Summer School in Paleoclimatology. The urbinossp.it domain is currently parked/for sale, so it serves no content. Re-enable when the school publishes a working site.
notes_zh: 乌尔比诺古气候学暑期学校。域名 urbinossp.it 当前处于停放/待售状态，无内容。待学校发布有效网站时重新启用。

name: CIDER
notes: Cooperative Institute for Dynamic Earth Research summer programme.
notes_zh: 动态地球研究合作研究所暑期项目。

name: Oxford ML Summer School
notes: OxML summer school on machine learning across application tracks.
notes_zh: OxML机器学习暑期学校，涵盖多个应用方向。

name: AMMI
notes: African Master of Machine Intelligence, fully funded programme.
notes_zh: 非洲机器智能硕士，全额资助项目。

name: IEEE GRSS
notes: IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Society events calendar. Cloudflare blocks the GitHub Actions runner's IP with a 403 (it loads from a normal browser). Check it directly.
notes_zh: IEEE地球科学与遥感学会活动日历。Cloudflare以403错误阻止了GitHub Actions运行器的IP（正常浏览器可加载）。请直接查看。

name: ISPRS
notes: International Society for Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing. Calendar path 404s; homepage links current activities.
notes_zh: 国际摄影测量与遥感学会。日历路径404错误；主页链接至当前活动。

name: GSA
notes: Geological Society of America. Direct event-list path 404s for scripted requests; homepage links current events.
notes_zh: 美国地质学会。脚本请求的直接事件列表路径返回404；主页链接当前活动。

name: EAGE
notes: European Association of Geoscientists and Engineers; runs many short courses and education days.
notes_zh: 欧洲地球科学家与工程师协会；举办众多短期课程和教育日活动。

name: EarthScope
notes: EarthScope Consortium (formerly IRIS/UNAVCO); seismology and geodesy short courses and summer workshops.
notes_zh: EarthScope联盟（原IRIS/UNAVCO）；地震学与大地测量学短期课程及夏季研讨会。

name: CIG Geodynamics
notes: Computational Infrastructure for Geodynamics; computational geoscience workshops and training.
notes_zh: 计算地球动力学计算基础设施；计算地球科学研讨会与培训。

name: EUMETSAT Training
notes: EUMETSAT training portal for satellite meteorology and climate.
notes_zh: EUMETSAT卫星气象与气候培训门户。

name: ICOS
notes: Integrated Carbon Observation System events and training.
notes_zh: 综合碳观测系统活动与培训。

name: ICTP-SAIFR
notes: South American Institute for Fundamental Research (ICTP partner); runs data science, ML, and climate schools.
notes_zh: 南美基础研究所（ICTP合作伙伴）；举办数据科学、机器学习和气候学校。

name: Lamont-Doherty
notes: Lamont-Doherty Earth Observatory (Columbia University). Blocks datacenter IPs; loads from the residential connection used for Monday/Wednesday/Friday source scans.
notes_zh: 哥伦比亚大学拉蒙特-多尔蒂地球观测站。该网站会屏蔽数据中心 IP，但可通过每周一、周三和周五来源扫描使用的住宅网络连接正常加载。

name: IPAM
notes: UCLA Institute for Pure and Applied Mathematics; graduate summer schools in data science, ML, and computational science, usually with travel support.
notes_zh: UCLA 纯数学与应用数学研究所；数据科学、机器学习和计算科学研究生暑期学校，通常提供差旅支持。

name: CLIVAR
notes: World Climate Research Programme's CLIVAR project; climate variability and predictability schools and events.
notes_zh: 世界气候研究计划（WCRP）的CLIVAR项目；气候变率与可预测性培训及活动。

name: APECS
notes: Association of Polar Early Career Scientists; polar and cryosphere training schools and webinars.
notes_zh: 极地早期职业科学家协会；极地与冰冻圈培训学校及网络研讨会。

name: Barcelona Supercomputing Center
notes: BSC training in high-performance and data-driven computational science, including ML for science.
notes_zh: 高性能与数据驱动计算科学（含科学机器学习）的BSC培训

name: Climate Change AI
notes: AI for climate. Its events page is client-side rendered, so it uses the optional Playwright headless browser during local Monday/Wednesday/Friday source scans. Its flagship summer school is virtual, so expect mostly near-matches.
notes_zh: 面向气候领域的人工智能项目。其活动页面由客户端渲染，因此本机每周一、周三和周五抓取来源时会使用可选的 Playwright 无头浏览器。其旗舰暑校为线上形式，因此多数结果预计只会归入近似匹配。

name: Summer Schools in Europe
notes: Cross-disciplinary aggregator. Disabled when the project refocused on water/climate/geoscience/remote-sensing/ML; it is mostly off-domain and also returns 403 for scripted requests.
notes_zh: 跨学科聚合器。当项目重新聚焦于水/气候/地球科学/遥感/机器学习时被禁用；它大多不在领域内，且对脚本请求返回403错误。

name: Utrecht Summer School
notes: Large general summer school programme. Disabled when the project refocused on its core domain; most courses are off-domain and fee-based.
notes_zh: 大型综合性暑期学校项目。当项目重新聚焦核心领域后停办；多数课程为非核心领域且需付费。

name: CERN Academic Training
notes: Content is rendered client-side, so this source uses the optional Playwright headless browser. Falls back to an empty fetch if Playwright is not installed.
notes_zh: 内容在客户端渲染，因此此来源使用可选的Playwright无头浏览器。如果未安装Playwright，则回退为空请求。

name: ICTP
notes: Abdus Salam ICTP runs many funded schools in geophysics, climate, and scientific ML. The /scientific-calendar path 404s; /home/scientific-calendar works for scripted requests.
notes_zh: Abdus Salam ICTP 在地球物理学、气候和科学机器学习领域举办多项资助的培训活动。/scientific-calendar 路径返回 404；/home/scientific-calendar 可用于脚本请求。

name: LxMLS
notes: Lisbon Machine Learning School. The canonical lxmls.it.pt domain times out from the CI runner, so this points at the current edition on GitHub Pages directly. Bump the year when a new edition is published.
notes_zh: 里斯本机器学习学校。官方域名 lxmls.it.pt 在 CI 运行器中超时，因此直接指向 GitHub Pages 上的当前版本。新版本发布时更新年份。

name: Karthaus Summer School
notes: Utrecht University's Karthaus course on ice sheets and climate; a flagship funded cryosphere school.
notes_zh: 乌得勒支大学关于冰盖与气候的Karthaus课程；一项旗舰级资助的冰冻圈学校。

name: WHOI GFD Program
notes: Woods Hole Geophysical Fluid Dynamics summer program; a classic funded ten-week school in ocean and climate fluid dynamics.
notes_zh: 伍兹霍尔地球物理流体动力学暑期项目；一个经典的、有资助的十周海洋与气候流体动力学学校。

name: NCEO
notes: UK National Centre for Earth Observation training, including its annual Earth observation summer school.
notes_zh: 英国国家地球观测中心培训，包括其年度地球观测暑期学校。

name: POGO
notes: Partnership for Observation of the Global Ocean; funded ocean-observation training and fellowships.
notes_zh: 全球海洋观测伙伴关系；资助的海洋观测培训与奖学金。

name: Cyprus Institute
notes: The Cyprus Institute graduate school runs summer schools in climate, computational science, and machine learning.
notes_zh: 塞浦路斯研究所研究生院举办气候、计算科学和机器学习暑期学校。

name: AGU
notes: American Geophysical Union. Direct event paths 404 for scripted requests; the homepage links current meetings and courses.
notes_zh: 美国地球物理联合会。脚本请求的直接活动路径返回404；主页链接当前会议和课程。

name: NCAS
notes: UK National Centre for Atmospheric Science; runs funded atmospheric and climate science training courses and summer schools.
notes_zh: 英国国家大气科学中心；运营资助的大气与气候科学培训课程及暑期学校。

name: Les Houches Physics School
notes: Les Houches School of Physics; among its sessions are climate-physics and scientific machine-learning schools. Off-domain physics sessions are dropped by the filters.
notes_zh: 莱苏什物理学院；其课程包括气候物理和科学机器学习学校。非本领域的物理课程会被筛选掉。

name: ESSLLI
notes: European Summer School in Logic, Language and Information — the flagship logic/language/computation school. The landing page is client-side rendered, so it uses the optional headless browser.
notes_zh: 欧洲逻辑、语言与信息暑期学校——逻辑/语言/计算领域的旗舰学校。着陆页为客户端渲染，因此使用可选的无头浏览器。

name: LSA Linguistic Institute
notes: The Linguistic Society of America's biennial summer Linguistic Institute, a major funded linguistics training school.
notes_zh: 美国语言学会每两年举办的暑期语言学院，是一个大型资助性语言学培训学校。

name: LOT School
notes: The Dutch national graduate school in linguistics (LOT); runs funded summer and winter schools across linguistics subfields.
notes_zh: 荷兰国家语言学研究生院（LOT）；在语言学各子领域举办有资助的暑期和冬季学校。

name: EGG School
notes: Eastern Generative Grammar summer school in theoretical linguistics, held in Central/Eastern Europe with low fees.
notes_zh: 理论语言学东欧生成语法暑期学校，位于中/东欧，费用低廉。

name: Leiden Linguistics Summer School
notes: Leiden Summer School in Languages and Linguistics; academic linguistics (not language-teaching) courses.
notes_zh: 莱顿暑期语言与语言学学校；学术语言学（非语言教学）课程。

name: CLASP Gothenburg
notes: Centre for Linguistic Theory and Studies in Probability (University of Gothenburg); computational linguistics and language-technology events and schools.
notes_zh: 语言理论与概率研究中心（哥德堡大学）；计算语言学与语言技术相关活动及学校。

name: ICVSS
notes: International Computer Vision Summer School (Sicily); a flagship, competitive computer-vision school.
notes_zh: 国际计算机视觉暑期学校（西西里）；旗舰级、竞争性计算机视觉学校。

name: DS3 Data Science Summer School
notes: École Polytechnique Data Science Summer School (DS3); data science and machine learning.
notes_zh: 巴黎综合理工学院数据科学暑期学校（DS3）；数据科学与机器学习。

name: Heidelberg Laureate Forum
notes: HLF brings young researchers together with Turing/Abel/Fields laureates; fully funded for selected applicants.
notes_zh: HLF汇聚青年研究人员与图灵奖/阿贝尔奖/菲尔兹奖得主；入选者获全额资助。

name: OPLSS
notes: Oregon Programming Languages Summer School; programming languages, type theory, and formal methods.
notes_zh: 俄勒冈编程语言暑期学校；编程语言、类型理论与形式化方法。

name: LASER Software Engineering School
notes: LASER summer school on software engineering (Elba, Italy), organised by ETH Zurich. Times out from some connections; skipped silently when unreachable.
notes_zh: LASER软件工程暑期学校（意大利厄尔巴岛），由苏黎世联邦理工学院组织。部分连接超时；无法访问时静默跳过。

name: CISPA
notes: CISPA Helmholtz Center for Information Security (Saarbrücken); runs a funded cybersecurity summer school and research events.
notes_zh: CISPA亥姆霍兹信息安全中心（萨尔布吕肯）；举办资助的网络安全暑期学校和研究活动。

name: SBA Research
notes: Austrian research centre for information security; security training, schools, and events.
notes_zh: 奥地利信息安全研究中心；提供安全培训、学校及活动。

name: Santa Fe Institute
notes: Santa Fe Institute Complex Systems Summer School (CSSS) and related schools; funded interdisciplinary training in complex systems, networks, and data science.
notes_zh: 圣塔菲研究所复杂系统暑期学校（CSSS）及相关学校；资助的复杂系统、网络与数据科学跨学科培训。

name: DeepLearn
notes: International School on Deep Learning (IRDTA). Points at the current edition; bump the year when a new one is published.
notes_zh: 国际深度学习学校（IRDTA）。指向当前版本；新版本发布时更新年份。

name: EurAI ACAI
notes: EurAI Advanced Course on Artificial Intelligence (ACAI); the European AI society's advanced school.
notes_zh: EurAI 高级人工智能课程（ACAI）；欧洲人工智能协会的高级学校。

name: Friday Harbor Laboratories
notes: University of Washington Friday Harbor Labs; funded marine science field courses and summer programmes.
notes_zh: 华盛顿大学星期五港实验室；资助的海洋科学实地课程和暑期项目。

name: SOLAS
notes: Surface Ocean Lower Atmosphere Study; ocean-atmosphere and climate summer schools.
notes_zh: 表层海洋低层大气研究；海洋-大气与气候暑期学校。

name: CSCS Summer School
notes: Swiss National Supercomputing Centre (CSCS); summer school on HPC and effective scientific computing.
notes_zh: 瑞士国家超级计算中心（CSCS）；HPC与高效科学计算暑期学校。

name: Argonne ATPESC
notes: Argonne Training Program on Extreme-Scale Computing (ATPESC); funded intensive HPC training.
notes_zh: 极大规模计算阿贡培训计划（ATPESC）；资助的密集型高性能计算培训。

name: CESM Tutorial
notes: NCAR Community Earth System Model (CESM) tutorial; hands-on climate-model training, usually funded for participants.
notes_zh: NCAR社区地球系统模型（CESM）教程；气候模型实践培训，通常为参与者提供资助。

name: GEOMAR
notes: GEOMAR Helmholtz Centre for Ocean Research Kiel; ocean and climate research schools and events.
notes_zh: GEOMAR亥姆霍兹基尔海洋研究中心；海洋与气候研究学校及活动。

name: CINECA HPC
notes: CINECA (Italian national supercomputing centre) training events and HPC schools.
notes_zh: CINECA（意大利国家超级计算中心）培训活动与高性能计算学校。

name: Oxford Robotics Institute
notes: Oxford Robotics Institute; robotics and machine-learning research, schools, and events.
notes_zh: 牛津机器人研究所；机器人学与机器学习研究、学校及活动。

name: Mila
notes: Mila - Quebec AI Institute (Montreal); hosts ML summer schools and training programmes.
notes_zh: Mila - 魁北克人工智能研究所（蒙特利尔）；主办机器学习暑期学校与培训项目。

name: OIST OCNC
notes: Okinawa Computational Neuroscience Course (OCNC); a flagship funded comp-neuro summer course.
notes_zh: 冲绳计算神经科学课程（OCNC）；旗舰资助的计算神经科学暑期课程。

name: MBL Courses
notes: Marine Biological Laboratory advanced research training courses, including Methods in Computational Neuroscience.
notes_zh: 海洋生物学实验室高级研究培训课程，包括计算神经科学方法。

name: CSHL Courses
notes: Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory courses, including computational neuroscience and quantitative biology schools.
notes_zh: 冷泉港实验室课程，包括计算神经科学和定量生物学学校。

name: CAJAL Training
notes: CAJAL Advanced Neuroscience Training Programme; intensive European neuroscience courses, including computational neuroscience.
notes_zh: CAJAL 高级神经科学培训项目；欧洲密集型神经科学课程，包括计算神经科学。

name: Bernstein Network
notes: Bernstein Network Computational Neuroscience (Germany); schools and courses in computational neuroscience.
notes_zh: Bernstein网络计算神经科学（德国）；计算神经科学领域的学校与课程。

name: CIFAR DLRL Summer School
notes: CIFAR Deep Learning and Reinforcement Learning (DLRL) Summer School (Canada); funded for selected students.
notes_zh: CIFAR深度学习与强化学习（DLRL）暑期学校（加拿大）；为入选学生提供资助。

name: IBRO
notes: International Brain Research Organization; runs neuroscience schools worldwide, including computational neuroscience.
notes_zh: 国际脑研究组织；在全球举办神经科学学校，包括计算神经科学。

name: ECPR Methods School
notes: European Consortium for Political Research Methods Schools; social-science research-methods training.
notes_zh: 欧洲政治研究联盟方法学校；社会科学研究方法培训。

name: ICPSR Summer Program
notes: University of Michigan ICPSR Summer Program in Quantitative Methods of Social Research; a flagship social-science methods school.
notes_zh: 密歇根大学ICPSR社会研究定量方法暑期项目；旗舰级社会科学方法学府。

name: Essex Summer School
notes: Essex Summer School in Social Science Data Analysis; long-running quantitative social-science methods school.
notes_zh: 埃塞克斯社会科学数据分析暑期学校；历史悠久的定量社会科学方法培训项目。

name: Essex Summer School
notes: Official ESS application page; carries session-specific application closing dates and programme dates.
notes_zh: ESS官方申请页面；包含各期申请截止日期和项目日期。

name: CEU Summer University
notes: Central European University Summer University; social science and humanities courses, often with funding for selected participants.
notes_zh: 中欧大学暑期学校；社会科学与人文学科课程，通常为入选者提供资助。

name: EUI
notes: European University Institute (Florence); summer schools in history, economics, political and social science, and law.
notes_zh: 欧洲大学学院（佛罗伦萨）；历史、经济、政治与社会科学及法律暑期学校。

name: DHSI
notes: Digital Humanities Summer Institute (Victoria); training at the intersection of humanities and computing.
notes_zh: 数字人文学暑期学院（维多利亚）；人文与计算交叉领域的培训。

name: IHR History
notes: Institute of Historical Research (London); historical-research training and events.
notes_zh: 历史研究所（伦敦）；历史研究培训与活动。

name: Khipu
notes: Khipu Latin American Meeting in Artificial Intelligence; a funded AI summer school.
notes_zh: Khipu拉丁美洲人工智能会议；一个资助型AI暑期学校。

name: Helmholtz AI
notes: Helmholtz AI; AI-for-science training, schools, and conferences across the Helmholtz association.
notes_zh: 亥姆霍兹人工智能；亥姆霍兹协会内的人工智能科学培训、学校及会议。

name: Wellcome Connecting Science
notes: Wellcome Connecting Science advanced courses and conferences; genomics and computational biology training, many with bursaries.
notes_zh: Wellcome Connecting Science 高级课程与会议；基因组学与计算生物学培训，许多提供助学金。

name: Physalia Courses
notes: Physalia-Courses; intensive bioinformatics and data-analysis courses for the life sciences.
notes_zh: Physalia-Courses；面向生命科学领域的生物信息学与数据分析强化课程。

name: CISM
notes: International Centre for Mechanical Sciences (Udine); advanced schools in computational and applied science, including ML for engineering.
notes_zh: 国际机械科学中心（乌迪内）；计算与应用科学高级研修班，包括工程中的机器学习。

name: EARSeL
notes: European Association of Remote Sensing Laboratories; remote-sensing summer schools and training.
notes_zh: 欧洲遥感实验室协会；遥感暑期学校与培训。

name: Alan Turing Institute
notes: The Alan Turing Institute (UK national institute for data science and AI); training events, schools, and workshops.
notes_zh: 艾伦·图灵研究所（英国国家数据科学与人工智能研究所）；培训活动、暑期学校和研讨会。

name: Tinbergen Institute
notes: Tinbergen Institute (Amsterdam/Rotterdam); economics and econometrics summer schools.
notes_zh: 丁伯根研究所（阿姆斯特丹/鹿特丹）；经济学与计量经济学暑期学校。

name: CECAM
notes: Centre Européen de Calcul Atomique et Moléculaire; schools and workshops in computational chemistry, materials, and ML for molecular science.
notes_zh: 欧洲原子与分子计算中心；计算化学、材料及分子科学机器学习领域的学校与研讨会。

name: Boulder School
notes: Boulder School for Condensed Matter and Materials Physics; a funded graduate summer school.
notes_zh: 博尔德凝聚态与材料物理暑期学校；有资助的研究生暑期学校。

name: Aspen Center for Physics
notes: Aspen Center for Physics; summer workshops and programmes across physics and astrophysics.
notes_zh: 阿斯彭物理中心；涵盖物理学和天体物理学的夏季研讨会与项目。

name: KITP
notes: Kavli Institute for Theoretical Physics (UC Santa Barbara); programmes and schools across theoretical physics.
notes_zh: 卡弗里理论物理研究所（加州大学圣塔芭芭拉分校）；涵盖理论物理领域的项目与学校。

name: DESY Summer Student
notes: DESY Summer Student Programme; funded research training in particle and photon physics.
notes_zh: DESY暑期学生项目；粒子与光子物理学资助研究培训。

name: CIMPA
notes: CIMPA (Centre International de Mathématiques Pures et Appliquées); funded mathematics research schools, often in the Global South.
notes_zh: CIMPA（国际纯粹与应用数学中心）；资助的数学研究学校，通常位于全球南方。

name: Hague Academy of International Law
notes: The Hague Academy of International Law; summer courses in public and private international law, with scholarships.
notes_zh: 海牙国际法学院；国际公法与国际私法暑期课程，提供奖学金。

name: Asser Institute
notes: T.M.C. Asser Instituut (The Hague); international and European law summer programmes and training.
notes_zh: T.M.C. Asser Instituut（海牙）；国际与欧洲法暑期项目及培训。

name: EARLI
notes: European Association for Research on Learning and Instruction; the JURE summer school and research training in education.
notes_zh: 欧洲学习与教学研究协会；JURE暑期学校与教育研究培训。

name: Stazione Zoologica
notes: Stazione Zoologica Anton Dohrn (Naples); marine biology and ocean science research training.
notes_zh: 安东·多恩动物研究站（那不勒斯）；海洋生物学与海洋科学研究培训。

name: LSE Cities
notes: LSE Cities; urban studies research and summer programmes.
notes_zh: LSE Cities；城市研究及暑期项目。

name: The Berlage
notes: The Berlage Center for Advanced Studies in Architecture and Urban Design (TU Delft); architecture and urbanism programmes.
notes_zh: 贝尔拉格建筑与城市设计高级研究中心（代尔夫特理工大学）；建筑与城市主义项目。
